full_hover.neoperipheral.radar_block: A radar that can detect sub_level constructions within a set radius. It has limitations, such as outputting local coordinates.
full_hover.neoperipheral.creative_radar_: An advanced radar that can detect sub_level constructions within a set radius. It has no limitations.
full_hover.neoperipheral.socket: A peripheral socket that can hold up to 4 peripherals.
full_hover.neoperipheral.nfc_master: Allows reading, writing, and locking NFC cards.
full_hover.neoperipheral.crypto: Allows farming aura on the server.
full_hover.neoperipheral.entity_radar: An entity detector that can scan for players and mobs within a set radius.
full_hover.neoperipheral.sable_engine: An engine that allows moving sub_level constructions. It can move the construction in any direction, as well as rotate it.
full_hover.neoperipheral.linked_controll: Controller hub, allows connecting a Create linked controller to receive information about pressed buttons.
